description: S2 C-prover KAT: is_zk=1 trace randomization (SmallRng seed=1, with_random_cols(64) + width:=60) + per-column coset LDE (log_blowup 2, shift 7) + bit-reversed rows; lde_bitrev is the REAL committed matrix (gates G1/G2/G3 held). All matrices flat row-major, canonical u64 decimal per cell.
